description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, ornate design with three spacious drawers, each adorned with decorative handles and intricate carved embellishments. The front face is elegantly curved, and the legs are cabriole-style, adding a touch of sophistication. The top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the body, providing a stable area for placing items. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel being unadorned and framed. The handles are traditional bar pulls, and the drawer fronts display decorative floral motifs. The overall finish is a uniform, light color, giving it a refined and timeless appearance.
description: An ornate, light-colored chest of drawers with three large drawers, decorative handles, and carved embellishments. The design is classic with cabriole legs and a curved front.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with decorative handles and carved floral motifs, as well as ornate cabriole legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, framed panel and the curved profile of the top and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel with a simple frame.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain panel and visible leg curvature.
